items.headline: FluidStack drops €10 billion French AI project to focus on US
items.summary: FluidStack pulled out of a high-profile €10 billion data center project in France as it pivots toward the US after winning larger contracts there.

items.headline: FluidStack raises $450M Series B at $7.5B valuation
items.summary: FluidStack raised $450M in equity financing in January 2026 with Google in talks to invest approximately $100M at a $7.5B valuation.

items.headline: Google backs FluidStack's $1.3B Abernathy project financing
items.summary: TeraWulf and FluidStack announced successful pricing of project financing for 168 MW HPC joint venture with Google backing $1.3 billion in lease obligations.

items.headline: FluidStack hiring across multiple roles in March 2026
items.summary: FluidStack is actively hiring for roles including Data Center Superintendent, Senior Civil Engineer, and Associate General Counsel across Texas, New York, and California.

items.headline: FluidStack relocates headquarters from UK to New York
items.summary: FluidStack shifted its global headquarters from the UK to New York in December 2025, prioritizing U.S. AI and data center buildouts.

items.headline: Google reportedly invests $100M in FluidStack at $7.5B valuation
items.summary: Google could reportedly invest $100 million in AI cloud operator FluidStack as part of an effort to boost adoption of its tensor processing unit artificial intelligence chips.

items.headline: FluidStack cancels Eclairion data center agreement in France
items.summary: FluidStack canceled an agreement to provide infrastructure at a Paris-suburb data center being developed by Eclairion, which is set to host French AI lab Mistral.

items.headline: FluidStack in talks for $700M funding round at $7B valuation
items.summary: Neocloud FluidStack is negotiating a funding round of nearly $700 million that would value the company at $7 billion, led by ex-OpenAI fund Situational Awareness.

items.headline: Anthropic partners with FluidStack for $50B US infrastructure
items.summary: Anthropic announced a $50 billion partnership with FluidStack to develop custom data centers in Texas and New York, creating 800 permanent jobs and 2,400 construction jobs.

items.headline: Hut 8 announces AI partnership with Anthropic and FluidStack
items.summary: Hut 8 announced a partnership with Anthropic and FluidStack to develop at least 245 MW and up to 2,295 MW of AI data center infrastructure at River Bend campus in Louisiana.
